title: Add krun support to podman machine
body:
This PR adds libkrun support to podman machine.  This is an experimental feature and should not be marketed yet.  Before we unmark the experimental status on this function, we will need to have full CI support and a full podman point release has passed.

This work relies on the fact that vfkit and libkrun share a reasonably (if not perfectly) same API.  The --log-level debug option will not show a GUI screen for boots as krun is not capable of this.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Tested init, start, ssh, run nginx,stop manually locally and they all seem to work. 

Read-over of code  LGTM too.

Tested on M1 and M3 Pro, everything works fine, including GPU acceleration. I'd like to add proper support for `--log-level=debug` but I think it's better to do it in a different PR and get this one merged first. As for the code itself, I don't have anything to add on top of what @jakecorrenti and @Luap99 already pointed out.
